title: Manifesto Writing
description: Short, sharp, arguable: what manifestos do that essays can't.
summary_pt_br: Manifesto: menos de 1000 palavras, lista ok, afirmações discutíveis, sentenças declarativas, chamado à ação.

scenes.subtitle_en: Short, sharp, arguable: what manifestos do that essays can't.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Manifesto: menos de 1000 palavras, lista ok, afirmações discutíveis, sentenças declarativas, chamado à ação.

scenes.text_en: Short, sharp, arguable: what manifestos do that essays can't. Focus: manifesto writing. A manifesto makes an argument, not an essay.
scenes.text_pt: Manifesto: menos de 1000 palavras, lista ok, afirmações discutíveis, sentenças declarativas, chamado à ação. Foco: manifesto writing. Manifesto faz argumento, não ensaio.

scenes.title: Manifesto Writing
scenes.body_en: Manifesto rules: UNDER 1000 words. LIST form welcome. Arguable claims, not neutral observations. Declarative sentences. A call to action at the end.
scenes.body_pt: Manifesto: menos de 1000 palavras, lista ok, afirmações discutíveis, sentenças declarativas, chamado à ação.

examples.en: A manifesto makes an argument, not an essay.
Every manifesto ends in a call to action.
examples.pt: Todo manifesto termina em chamado à ação.

exercise.question: Complete: "A ___ makes an argument, not an essay."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "A manifesto makes an argument, not an essay."

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Manifesto Writing — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre manifesto writing. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Joca, open a manifesto in one sentence.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How long is the whole piece?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Build with us, or watch us win.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Manifestos are arguments that refuse neutrality.

scenes.title: The founding manifesto
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe four manifesto moves. Use at least three manifesto terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: The night before the company's relaunch, Joca drafted the shortest important document of his career.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: Small teams deserve enterprise tools — that is the one sentence that survived every round of revision tonight.

paragraphs.speaker: Co-founder
paragraphs.en: Three principles — transparency, speed, kindness — written as declarative sentences, never as polite suggestions.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: The whole manifesto stays under a thousand words, because reading it should feel like swallowing an espresso.

paragraphs.speaker: Co-founder
paragraphs.en: And the final line — 'build with us, or watch us win' — is a call to action and a line in the sand.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Manifestos, Joca believed, are arguments that refuse neutrality — and that refusal is what separates movements from meetings.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Manifesto Writing". Short, sharp, arguable: what manifestos do that essays can't. A manifesto makes an argument, not an essay. Declarative sentences beat qualified ones. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Manifesto Writing". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
